notes: Reproduced on all tested versions (3.116.0, 3.119.2, and main branch source). When an exception is thrown during SKSvgCanvas drawing and caught externally without disposing the canvas, the managed SKManagedWStream is collected by GC while the native SVG canvas still holds a reference to it. When the native canvas finalizer tries to flush/write through the managed stream callback, GetUserData returns null and SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation throws NullReferenceException. The crash is deterministic and reliably triggered by forcing GC after the undisposed canvas goes out of scope.

reproductionSteps.description: Create console repro project with SkiaSharp 3.116.0
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net8.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.116.0
reproductionSteps.output:

=== Issue #3259 Reproduction ===
SkiaSharp version: 3.116.0.0

Step 1: Calling DrawSVG (will throw during drawing)...
  Caught expected exception: Simulated drawing error in DrawSomeStuff

Step 2: Forcing garbage collection...
Unhandled exception. System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object.
   at SkiaSharp.DelegateProxies.SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation(IntPtr s, Void* context, Void* buffer, IntPtr size)

versionResults.notes: NullReferenceException in SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation during GC finalization. Process exits with code 134 (SIGABRT).
Same NRE in SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation. Bug persists in latest stable release.
Same NRE at DelegateProxies.wstream.cs:line 35. Bug still present on main branch.

errorMessages.primaryError: System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object. at SkiaSharp.DelegateProxies.SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation(IntPtr s, Void* context, Void* buffer, IntPtr size)
errorMessages.stackTrace:
Unhandled exception. System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object.
   at SkiaSharp.DelegateProxies.SKManagedWStreamWriteProxyImplementation(IntPtr s, Void* context, Void* buffer, IntPtr size)

actionability.reason: Reproduced on all versions including main branch. The delegate proxy lacks a null-check on GetUserData result. All delegate proxy callbacks (wstream, stream, drawable) should be audited for this pattern.

workarounds: Use a using statement or try/finally block to ensure SKSvgCanvas is always disposed, even when exceptions occur during drawing.
